caption: A video shows a split-screen interface featuring a spreadsheet on the left and a video feed on the right. The spreadsheet lists various names and NBA teams, such as "Simon Meyer" for "BROOKLYN NETS" and "Carl Hagdorn" for "CHARLOTTE HORNETS." To the right, a chat window displays messages from "gloveg27" and "Nightbot," including a link for "the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/2SdeK9y." Below this is a video feed of a man with a beard and dark hair wearing a black t-shirt, sitting in a room with white walls and a window behind him. A red and white "CASEBREAKS.COM" logo is superimposed at the bottom of his video feed. The scene remains static across the frames, with no changes in the man's position, the on-screen text, or the spreadsheet data.
